data.content: Implemented the Settings > Agents OpenCode dropdown label fix on branch foolery-5cc7. OpenCode scanned options now derive their visible label from the last non-empty '/'-delimited model-id token while preserving the original modelId/value. The dropdown option label span now wraps instead of truncating so long final tokens remain visible. Added regression tests for OpenCode scan labels and visible selected-label rendering. Validation: bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run lint; bun run test; bun run build.
